body.label: thm:square_even_contrapositive
body.name: thm_square_even_contrapositive
body.claim: If n^2 is even, then n is even.

proof_steps.text: If n=2k+1, then n^2=2(2k^2+2k)+1, so n^2 is odd.

source.text:
Theorem. If n^2 is even, then n is even.

Proof. We prove the contrapositive. Assume n is odd, so n=2k+1 for some integer k. Then n^2=(2k+1)^2=2(2k^2+2k)+1, which is odd. Therefore if n^2 is even, n is even.
source.label: thm:square_even_contrapositive
